notes: Multi-role guard manifest. Replace placeholder paths with five real
guard cases drawn from the local corpus before running.
Goal: extend the bounded guard run beyond the existing Psalm 130 keys
role-filtered) to drums, bass, rhythm guitar, lead guitar, and at
least one additional keys/piano case. Closing this manifest is the
exit criterion for treating the quality benchmark as a promotion gate
(see wip.md > Transcription quality program > Run the generated
full-corpus quality manifest on local guard cases).
family=drums      for drum stems with a reference MIDI
family=melodic    for monophonic instrument stems (bass, guitars)
role            : drums | bass | rhythm_guitar | lead_guitar | keys
offset_sec      : audio start offset relative to reference MIDI

cases.name: TODO drums guard case
cases.intent: Lock combined_filter / spectral_flux_multiband / beat_conditioned_multiband_decoder behavior on a real drum stem. Should detect a Psalm 12-style hallucination regression in addition to the synthetic guard at python/ingest/tests/test_drum_sparse_source_precision.py.

cases.name: TODO bass guard case
cases.intent: Pin melodic_yin_octave_hps_fix / melodic_adaptive / melodic_yin_bass80 / melodic_octave_fix on a clean monophonic bass stem with reference MIDI.

cases.name: TODO rhythm guitar guard case
cases.intent: Pin melodic_hpss_combined / melodic_adaptive / melodic_octave_fix / melodic_combined on a chord-heavy rhythm guitar stem.

cases.name: TODO lead guitar guard case
cases.intent: Pin melodic_adaptive / melodic_octave_fix / melodic_combined / basic_pitch on a monophonic lead-guitar stem.

cases.name: TODO additional keys/piano guard case
cases.intent: Pair with the existing Psalm 130 keys / piano_auto guard so two keys/piano cases sit in the regression set; piano_auto / piano_polyphonic_clean / melodic_octave_fix / melodic_hpss_combined.
